creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Security update to version 3.2.0.1 due to a XSS vulnerability.

Announce message:

    "Welcome to the first security release for phpMyAdmin 3.2.0.

     Details will follow on http://phpmyadmin.net in the Security
     section (see PMASA-2009-5).

     In a hurry? you can visit
     http://sourceforge.net/projects/phpmyadmin to download.

     Marc Delisle, for the team"

Security Advisory:

     http://www.phpmyadmin.net/home_page/security/PMASA-2009-5.php

Change Log:

     http://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?release_id=693468
